---
title: "About Me"
output:
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
    includes:
      in_header: header.html
    theme: null
    highlight: null
    self_contained: false
    mathjax: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

<nav class="navbar">
  <div class="nav-brand">AM</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="about.html" class="active">About Me</a></li>
    <li><a href="projects.html">Projects</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<section class="page-hero">
  <h1 class="page-title">About Me</h1>
  <div class="title-underline"></div>
</section>

<section class="about-section">
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-photo-col">
      <div class="photo-placeholder">
        <span>Your Photo Here</span>
        <p style="font-size:0.8rem; margin-top:0.5rem;">Replace with your image in the .Rmd file</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-text-col">
      <h2>Hi there! 👋</h2>
      <p>
        I'm Anastasiia Merchanskaia, a passionate researcher and data analyst based in Chapel Hill, NC. 
        I love working with data to uncover patterns and tell meaningful stories.
      </p>
      <p>
        Currently studying at University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill. I  am majoring in Statistics and Analytics. 
      </p>
      <p>
        When I'm not analyzing data, you'll find me exploring outdoors, cooking, or traveling.
      </p>
      <a href="resume.pdf" class="btn-primary" download>Download CV</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="skills-section">
  <h2 class="section-title">Skills & Tools</h2>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h3>Programming</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="tag">R</span>
        <span class="tag">Python</span>
        <span class="tag">SQL</span>
        <span class="tag">Git</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h3>Analysis</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="tag">Statistics</span>
        <span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
        <span class="tag">Data Viz</span>
        <span class="tag">ggplot2</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h3>Tools</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="tag">RStudio</span>
        <span class="tag">Quarto</span>
        <span class="tag">Tableau</span>
        <span class="tag">Excel</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="education-section">
  <h2 class="section-title">Education</h2>
  <div class="timeline">
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <h3>Degree Name</h3>
        <p class="timeline-place">University Name · 2020–2024</p>
        <p>Brief description of your studies or thesis topic.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <h3>Previous Degree or Certificate</h3>
        <p class="timeline-place">Institution Name · 2016–2020</p>
        <p>Brief description of your studies.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Anastasiia Merchanskaia · Built with R Markdown</p>
  <div class="social-links">
    <a href="https://github.com/anastasiam1165-beep" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/anastasiia-merchanskaia" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
  </div>
</footer>
